Package neqsim.process.safety.opendrain

Class OpenDrainProcessEvidenceCalculator

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.safety.opendrain.OpenDrainProcessEvidenceCalculator
public final class OpenDrainProcessEvidenceCalculator extends Object
Builds open-drain review evidence directly from NeqSim process and thermodynamic objects.

The calculator keeps NeqSim central in open-drain reviews by deriving credible process liquid leak rates, liquid density, operating pressure, fire-water load, and gravity-drain hydraulic capacity from StreamInterface, ProcessEquipmentInterface, or ProcessSystem objects. The calculated values are written to OpenDrainReviewItem fields consumed by OpenDrainReviewEngine.

Version:
1.0
Author:
NeqSim contributors

  • Constructor Details

    • OpenDrainProcessEvidenceCalculator

      private OpenDrainProcessEvidenceCalculator()
      Utility class constructor.

  • Method Details

    • createInputFromStream

      public static OpenDrainReviewInput createInputFromStream(String projectName, StreamInterface stream, OpenDrainProcessEvidenceCalculator.DesignBasis designBasis)
      Creates a review input containing one item calculated from a NeqSim stream.
      Parameters:
      projectName - project, asset, or review name
      stream - stream providing fluid state and flow rate
      designBasis - open-drain design and safeguard basis
      Returns:
      review input populated with NeqSim-calculated evidence
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if stream is null

    • createItemFromStream

      public static OpenDrainReviewItem createItemFromStream(StreamInterface stream, OpenDrainProcessEvidenceCalculator.DesignBasis designBasis)
      Creates one review item from a NeqSim stream.
      Parameters:
      stream - stream providing fluid state and flow rate
      designBasis - open-drain design and safeguard basis
      Returns:
      review item populated with calculated evidence
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if stream is null

    • createItemFromEquipment

      public static OpenDrainReviewItem createItemFromEquipment(ProcessEquipmentInterface equipment, OpenDrainProcessEvidenceCalculator.DesignBasis designBasis)
      Creates one review item from a NeqSim process equipment object.
      Parameters:
      equipment - process equipment providing inlet or outlet streams
      designBasis - open-drain design and safeguard basis
      Returns:
      review item populated with calculated evidence
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if equipment is null or has no streams

    • createInputFromProcessSystem

      public static OpenDrainReviewInput createInputFromProcessSystem(ProcessSystem process, OpenDrainProcessEvidenceCalculator.DesignBasis designBasis)
      Creates review input from every process-system unit that exposes an inlet or outlet stream.
      Parameters:
      process - process system to inspect
      designBasis - default open-drain design and safeguard basis
      Returns:
      review input populated with one item per stream-bearing unit
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if process is null

    • calculateCredibleLiquidLeakRateKgPerS

      public static double calculateCredibleLiquidLeakRateKgPerS(double liquidMassFlowKgPerS, double leakFractionOfLiquidFlow, double maximumCredibleLeakKgPerS)
      Calculates credible liquid leak rate from the NeqSim liquid mass flow.
      Parameters:
      liquidMassFlowKgPerS - liquid mass flow rate in kg/s
      leakFractionOfLiquidFlow - credible leak fraction of liquid flow
      maximumCredibleLeakKgPerS - maximum credible leak cap in kg/s, or NaN for no cap
      Returns:
      credible liquid leak rate in kg/s

    • calculateFireWaterLoadKgPerS

      public static double calculateFireWaterLoadKgPerS(double fireWaterAreaM2, double applicationRateLPerMinM2, double fireWaterDensityKgPerM3)
      Calculates fire-water mass load from application rate and area.
      Parameters:
      fireWaterAreaM2 - protected or deluged area in m2
      applicationRateLPerMinM2 - fire-water application rate in L/min/m2
      fireWaterDensityKgPerM3 - fire-water density in kg/m3
      Returns:
      fire-water mass load in kg/s, or zero if area or rate is not configured

    • calculateGravityDrainCapacityKgPerS

      public static double calculateGravityDrainCapacityKgPerS(double liquidDensityKgPerM3, double drainPipeDiameterM, double availableHeadM, double dischargeCoefficient, double backpressureBarg)
      Calculates gravity drain hydraulic capacity for a liquid-filled open-drain pipe.
      Parameters:
      liquidDensityKgPerM3 - liquid density in kg/m3
      drainPipeDiameterM - drain internal diameter in m
      availableHeadM - available hydraulic head in m liquid
      dischargeCoefficient - discharge coefficient for the drain inlet or pipe entrance
      backpressureBarg - downstream backpressure in barg opposing the available head
      Returns:
      drain mass-flow capacity in kg/s, or zero when effective head is not available

    • createBaseItem

      private static OpenDrainReviewItem createBaseItem(String areaId, OpenDrainProcessEvidenceCalculator.DesignBasis designBasis)
      Creates a base review item from design-basis metadata.
      Parameters:
      areaId - calculated area identifier
      designBasis - design and safeguard basis
      Returns:
      base review item

    • applySafeguardEvidence

      private static void applySafeguardEvidence(OpenDrainReviewItem item, OpenDrainProcessEvidenceCalculator.DesignBasis designBasis)
      Applies document or design-basis safeguards that the numerical calculation cannot infer.
      Parameters:
      item - item receiving safeguard evidence
      designBasis - safeguard basis

    • prepareFluid

      private static SystemInterface prepareFluid(StreamInterface stream)
      Prepares a cloned fluid for property reads without mutating the source stream.
      Parameters:
      stream - stream providing the fluid state
      Returns:
      cloned and initialized fluid

    • selectRepresentativeStream

      private static StreamInterface selectRepresentativeStream(ProcessEquipmentInterface equipment)
      Selects representative stream evidence from equipment.
      Parameters:
      equipment - process equipment to inspect
      Returns:
      first inlet stream, or first outlet stream if no inlet exists
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if no streams are connected

    • getLiquidMassFlowRateKgPerS

      private static double getLiquidMassFlowRateKgPerS(SystemInterface fluid)
      Gets total liquid mass flow rate from oil, aqueous, liquid, and asphaltene-liquid phases.
      Parameters:
      fluid - initialized fluid
      Returns:
      liquid mass flow rate in kg/s

    • getLiquidDensityKgPerM3

      private static double getLiquidDensityKgPerM3(SystemInterface fluid)
      Gets representative liquid density from liquid phases.
      Parameters:
      fluid - initialized fluid
      Returns:
      mass-flow-weighted liquid density in kg/m3, or total density when no liquid exists

    • isLiquidPhase

      private static boolean isLiquidPhase(PhaseType phaseType)
      Tests whether a phase type should be treated as liquid for open-drain leak evidence.
      Parameters:
      phaseType - phase type to test
      Returns:
      true for liquid-like phases

    • getStreamPressureBara

      private static double getStreamPressureBara(StreamInterface stream, SystemInterface fluid)
      Gets stream pressure from the stream or cloned fluid.
      Parameters:
      stream - source stream
      fluid - prepared fluid fallback
      Returns:
      pressure in bara

    • getStreamTemperatureC

      private static double getStreamTemperatureC(StreamInterface stream, SystemInterface fluid)
      Gets stream temperature from the stream or cloned fluid.
      Parameters:
      stream - source stream
      fluid - prepared fluid fallback
      Returns:
      temperature in deg C

    • putIfFinite

      private static void putIfFinite(OpenDrainReviewItem item, String key, double value)
      Adds a finite numeric value to a review item.
      Parameters:
      item - item receiving the value
      key - evidence key
      value - numeric value
